name: A Member Was Added to a Security-Enabled Global Group
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Alexandr Yampolskyi, SOC Prime
SIGMA Title: A Member Was Added to a Security-Enabled Global Group
SIGMA Description: Detects activity when a member is added to a security-enabled global group

False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('4728', '632') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY A Member Was Added to a Security-Enabled Global Group on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND "Event ID" IN('4728', '632') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: A Member Was Added to a Security-Enabled Global Group
